title: Publish installer pnpm warning guard as 0.3.20
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace versions, changelog, and docs/releases/0.3.20.md are aligned at 0.3.20.
The validated source proof bundle HTG-2026-04-19-pnpm-build-script-warning-guard remains the canonical product evidence for the release.
Fresh release verification passes after the version bump.
The release proof bundle is complete and validates successfully.
The release branch commit is pushed, merged to main, and the guarded Release workflow is dispatched for 0.3.20.
